title: Multi-platform core CI
purpose: Define a portable CI matrix that verifies the repository's cross-platform Node core on Ubuntu, macOS, and Windows without requiring Docker, bash-specific fresh-clone execution, or nested full verifier recursion on every platform.

excludes: full nested npm run pnp:verify on every OS
portableSubset.rationale: The full one-command verifier remains the default local and Linux CI entrypoint. This workflow proves the cross-platform Node core and manifest surface without assuming Docker, bash, Python fallback behavior, or long nested verification on every hosted OS.

nonClaims: This multi-platform CI surface does not activate public theorem emission.
This multi-platform CI surface does not clear Release.UnrestrictedFinalSoundness or ExternalReview.Acceptance.
The workflow checks a portable core subset on all listed platforms and does not yet prove full bit-identical behavior across every operating system.
Full pnp:verify remains the repository-level verifier; this matrix is a reproducibility confidence layer for the portable Node core.
